<?php namespace {{ namespace }}; use {{ namespacedModel }}; class {{ class }} { /** * Handle the {{ model }} "created" event. */ public function created({{ model }} ${{ modelVariable }}): void { // } /** * Handle the {{ model }} "updated" event. */ public function updated({{ model }} ${{ modelVariable }}): void { // } /** * Handle the {{ model }} "deleted" event. */ public function deleted({{ model }} ${{ modelVariable }}): void { // } /** * Handle the {{ model }} "restored" event. */ public function restored({{ model }} ${{ modelVariable }}): void { // } /** * Handle the {{ model }} "force deleted" event. */ public function forceDeleted({{ model }} ${{ modelVariable }}): void { // } }
